title: cli_rbfe_results
author: Travitz, Alyssa
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
TYK2 openfe cli results data with differing file structures for testing: 
 rbfe_results_serial_repeats: each protocol unit includes 3 simulation repeats, all under "results/".  
 rbfe_results_parallel_repeats: each protocol unit includes one simulation repeat, repeats are independent with output under "results_0", "results_1", "results_2" NOTE: this dataset is numerically identical to rbfe_results_serial_repeats, but has been manipulated to represent a dataset that had been run in parallel. 
 CHANGELOG 
 v1.0.1 
 FIXED: 
 
 added all protocol unit results to rbfe_results_parallel_repeats so that it matches rbfe_results_serial
